title: smilax lutescens
intro: Smilax lutescens, also known as the golden cat's claw or yellow-wooded greenbrier, is a type of flowering vine native to the southeastern United States. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Smilax lutescens include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Smilax lutescens can be found in supplement form, such as capsules or tablets, and can also be made into teas or infusions for topical use.
